examples: Or are his demands deliberately maximalist so that they cannot be met and the treaty remains unratified?
I think that Obama made a choice that he was going to go further down the taxation and more maximalist route early on.
Suddenly, it seemed as if every brand was proposing clothing that shouted even more loudly than anything my maximalist sisters and I would consider wearing.
We have to be -- we have to acknowledge that maximalist positions will not prevail.
He aimed to please, and this survey, with its maximalist installation, is an upbeat visual treat.
